name: SRG Mining Inc.
summary: SRG Mining Inc., a Canadian-based mining company, engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in Africa. The company explores for graphite, nickel, cobalt, and scandium deposits. It focuses on the Lola graphite deposit located in the Republic of Guinea, West Africa. The company was formerly known as SRG Graphite Inc. and changed its name to SRG Mining Inc. in July 2019. SRG Mining Inc. is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
